ABOUT

FARAZ HAIDER

Singer, Song Writer, Record Producer and Filmmaker, Faraz has been making music for a while now over the years. Faraz was initially the lead singer of the band “Andher” in early 2000s which later led to his solo career in 2010 when he launched his first debut album Andher
